category_sources: source_facts.description says Language server for Standard ML; official GitHub README says Millet is a language server for Standard ML.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses Millet; source_facts.name is millet.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage and source_facts.repo are the official GitHub repository; README documents installation links and language-server features.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/azdavis/millet, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a Standard ML language server; official GitHub README lists LSP/editor features and notes the implementation is in Rust.
